action.decode: clip to [-1,1]; throttle<=0 means engine group OFF, (0,1] is direct throttle; lean_* x LEAN_MAX = body-up target components

inner_loop_pd.law: e_body = R(q)^-1 [leanX-upX, 0, leanZ-upZ]; gp = clip(-k_att*e_body_z + k_rate*wx) * max_gimbal; gy = clip(+k_att*e_body_x + k_rate*wz) * max_gimbal; runs every physics substep (250 Hz)
